text:
ID (16th Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the 16th (out of 16 possible) managed care plan identification numbers under 
which the eligible beneficiary is enrolled. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months 
during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

States may use their own identifier or the national health plan identifier. 

SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_ID_16_01 
MC_PLAN_ID_16_02 
MC_PLAN_ID_16_03 
MC_PLAN_ID_16_04
